h2: Come home to the perfect fire

paragraphs: Product only. Pricing exclusions apply. Contact a dealer for more information.

The best-selling 6K/8K gas fireplace pairs powerful performance with refined design that brings a striking focal point to your space. Getting the right look is simple: choose from three Design Packages – Modern Farmhouse, Organic Modern, or New Traditional – each offering a curated set of fireplace front, interior panels and logs designed to match your home style. And with thoughtful features like voice control and adjustable heat management, it’s easy to set the mood and enjoy the fire your way, year‑round.
Experience easy, convenient control to fit your lifestyle. See your dealer for details.
Make your fireplace your own by personalizing the interior of your firebox from the many choices available. Options may vary by model. See your dealer for details.

Add a finishing touch to enhance your fireplace and distinguish your home. Browse fireplace fronts that frame your opening and glass or mesh doors in colors to complement your décor. Colors on screen can vary. Connect with your local dealer online or in person to see actual samples.
Explore a range of solutions to send the heat where you want it or control the fireplace output for maximum comfort.
Set the mood with dramatic accent lighting on select models. Light up your space with or without the fire.
Customize your fireplace with mantel shelving. Our exclusively designed shelving adds a distinctive touch to any fireplace in lengths and designs to accent any room.
Choose from three-sided flush mount designs to personalize your fireplace into a beautiful showpiece. Match your style whether it is traditional, transitional, or rustic.
Frame your fireplace for a finishing touch, meet safety clearances, and enhance the beautiful fire. Select a granite, marble, or slate facing for the perfect subtle look.
